inputs.label: Defect Rate (DPMO)
inputs.businessContext: Current defects per million opportunities for the process under evaluation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current defects per million opportunities for the process under evaluation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değerlendirilen süreç için milyon fırsat başına mevcut hata sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Fehler pro Million Möglichkeiten für den zu bewertenden Prozess.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Défauts actuels par million d'opportunités pour le processus évalué.

inputs.label: Current Process Sigma Level
inputs.businessContext: Current sigma level of the process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current sigma level of the process, typically derived from DPMO using standard conversion tables.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürecin mevcut sigma seviyesi, genellikle standart dönüşüm tabloları kullanılarak DPMO'dan türetilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelles Sigma-Niveau des Prozesses, typischerweise aus DPMO mit Standard-Umrechnungstabellen abgeleitet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau sigma actuel du processus, généralement dérivé du DPMO à l'aide de tables de conversion standard.

inputs.label: Annual Unit Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced or transactions processed per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced or transactions processed per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yılda üretilen toplam birim veya işlenen işlem sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der pro Jahr produzierten Einheiten oder bearbeiteten Transaktionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites ou de transactions traitées par an.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred per defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred per defect, including rework, scrap, warranty, and customer impact.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden işleme, fire, garanti ve müşteri etkisi dahil olmak üzere hata başına ortalama maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten pro Fehler, einschließlich Nacharbeit, Ausschuss, Garantie und Kundenauswirkungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen encouru par défaut, incluant reprise, rebut, garantie et impact client.

inputs.label: Estimated Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).

label_i18n.fr: Coût estimé de mise en œuvre

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost to implement the Six Sigma improvement project (training, equipment, downtime, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altı Sigma iyileştirme projesini uygulamanın toplam maliyeti (eğitim, ekipman, duruş süresi vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten für die Umsetzung des Six-Sigma-Verbesserungsprojekts (Schulung, Ausrüstung, Ausfallzeiten usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total pour mettre en œuvre le projet d'amélioration Six Sigma (formation, équipement, arrêt de production, etc.).

inputs.label: Project Risk Level
inputs.businessContext: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource availability, stakeholder buy-in).

businessContext_i18n.en: Qualitative assessment of risk associated with the project (technical complexity, resource availability, stakeholder buy-in).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projeyle ilişkili riskin nitel değerlendirmesi (teknik karmaşıklık, kaynak mevcudiyeti, paydaş katılımı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Qualitative Bewertung des mit dem Projekt verbundenen Risikos (technische Komplexität, Ressourcenverfügbarkeit, Stakeholder-Zustimmung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation qualitative du risque associé au projet (complexité technique, disponibilité des ressources, adhésion des parties prenantes).

inputs.label: Strategic Alignment Score
inputs.businessContext: How well the project aligns with organizational strategic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).

businessContext_i18n.en: How well the project aligns with organizational strategic goals (1 = low, 10 = high).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projenin kurumsal stratejik hedeflerle ne kadar uyumlu olduğu (1 = düşük, 10 = yüksek).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wie gut das Projekt mit den strategischen Zielen der Organisation übereinstimmt (1 = niedrig, 10 = hoch).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dans quelle mesure le projet s'aligne sur les objectifs stratégiques de l'organisation (1 = faible, 10 = élevé).

inputs.label: Customer Impact Score
inputs.businessContext: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).

businessContext_i18n.en: Degree of positive impact on customer satisfaction (1 = minimal, 10 = transformative).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri memnuniyeti üzerindeki olumlu etki derecesi (1 = minimum, 10 = dönüştürücü).
businessContext_i18n.de: Grad der positiven Auswirkung auf die Kundenzufriedenheit (1 = minimal, 10 = transformativ).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Degré d'impact positif sur la satisfaction client (1 = minimal, 10 = transformateur).

rules.message: Extremely low sigma level (<1.5) with positive defect rate; verify DPMO and sigma conversion.
Cost per defect must be greater than zero.
Annual volume must be greater than zero.
High-risk project with high implementation cost; consider phased approach.

thresholds.message: Defect rate exceeds 100,000 DPMO; process is in critical need of improvement.
Project ROI is negative; reconsider project feasibility.
Process sigma below 2.0; immediate action recommended.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
